coverage_note: Snake list = ALL binomial/trinomial names successfully parsed from WHO TRS Annex 5 Appendix 1 in this PDF (medically important species). This is NOT every snake species on Earth (~4000+). Hydrophiidae may be absent as a separate family label in this appendix edition.
symptom_note: Symptom rows = WHO TRS §19.3 / §20.2.3 + WHO fact sheet wording only (see symptom_catalog.csv).
